text: Moving from the hallway into this vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel as though I am at the threshold of ideas still in their chrysalis, yearning to emerge. The interplay of screens, books, and abstract colors fills me with anticipation and curiosity. In this space, I sense the dynamism of innovation—a place where knowledge is not fixed but always unfolding. Here, the boundaries between contemplation and creation become intriguingly blurred.
